title: Visual Thinking - inner landscapes - out of a black whole
description:
Visual Thinking - inner landscapes - out of a black whole

Da Vaz is a new type of constructivist. He never starts from an imagined perception or idea. He deconstructs perception itself even his own while starting each time anew. His creative method is emptiness. He says:”I start from the premise that the greatest creative potential exists in nothing. My role model is the viewfinder instinct in the animal world.

 Da Vaz'  advice ”BE NOSY”
